# Prompt 24 - Interview Preparation

# Enterprise Space Mission Data & AI Platform

> **Phase 24 - Interview Preparation**

Read `.github/prompts/_shared.prompt.md` first. This is a **documentation** phase.

---

# Objective

You are acting as Hiring Architect coach. Turn the platform into senior data/AI interview material.

---

# Critical Rules

- Map every artifact to interview talking points; no new build work.

---

# Tasks

1. Story: problem, scope, impact.
2. Architecture deep-dive Q&A.
3. Data engineering Q&A.
4. ML/MLOps Q&A.
5. RAG/LLM Q&A.
6. Trade-off & decision rationale.
7. System-design whiteboard prompts.
8. STAR behavioral stories.
9. Likely follow-ups & failure handling.
10. Glossary & cheat-sheet.

---

# Deliverables

```
docs/interview/ 01-story.md ... 09-followups.md 10-glossary.md README.md
```

# Acceptance Criteria

Q&A across all domains, system-design prompts, STAR stories complete.

# Definition of Done

Candidate can defend the platform end-to-end in interviews. Stop here.
